page_metadata.biotools__summary: BTyper3 is a command-line tool for taxonomically classifying Bacillus cereus group genomes using a novel, standardized nomenclature. Using BTyper3 to Assess the Congruency of a Proposed Taxonomic Framework for the Bacillus cereus group with Historical Typing Methods.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BTyper3 is a command-line tool for taxonomically classifying Bacillus cereus group genomes using a novel, standardized nomenclature. Using BTyper3 to Assess the Congruency of a Proposed Taxonomic Framework for the Bacillus cereus group with Historical Typing Methods.
